calendar.matters:
Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amendment To Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of 99 Rausch Owners Association
Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Andrew W. Gause; 925-284-4693; O'Toole Rogers, LLP; appearing as counsel for for 99 Rausch Owners Association.
Jeffrey Banks & Max Lashay; owners in part of 99 Rausch; appearing in pro per.

Hearing held. Owners inform the court that no opposition has been filed or any attorney retained. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 99 RAUSCH OWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION Motion For Order Granting Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amendment To Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Of 99 Rausch Owners Association is GRANTED.

Order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F, Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
